prompt: I'm running Whisper transcription on Modal and want to batch multiple audio inputs together per GPU call to maximize utilization
assertions: The code uses @modal.batched decorator on the transcription function
The code sets a batch_size appropriate for GPU memory and throughput
The code sets wait_ms to control how long to wait for a batch to fill
The decorated function receives a list of inputs and returns a list of results (matching length)
The code uses GPU resources (gpu= parameter) on the batched function
The response explains or demonstrates how callers invoke the batched function (individual calls that get coalesced)
